positive.stdout:

cnf(u22,axiom,
    animal_lover(tom)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    mean_to_animals(sK0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~animal_lover(X0) | nice_to_animals(X0)).

    ~mean_to_animals(X0) | ~nice_to_animals(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    grumpy(sK0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    pet_owner(tom)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~pet_owner(X0) | animal_lover(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~nice_to_animals(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
